# Strix Devs

> Software development and AI solutions agency based in Toronto, Canada, building custom web applications, SaaS products, AI automation pipelines, and cloud infrastructure for clients worldwide.

Strix Devs specializes in React/TypeScript web development, AI and RAG implementations, workflow automation (n8n), UI/UX design, DevOps, and API integrations.
